name: Eldoria
description:
### SYNOPSIS: ELDORIA & THE CITIZEN'S STRUGGLE

#### THE CITY OF GILDED CHAINS

Eldoria is an elven metropolis built atop the Aurelian Vein, the richest gold deposit in the known world. Its spires gleam under an enchanted skyline—gold-plated streets, crystal-infused architecture, and lush botanical gardens maintained by state-mandated labor. But beneath its radiant beauty lies an oppressive regime where every citizen is a cog in an unfeeling machine.

- Population:

- 90% Wood Elves – The labor class; miners, refiners, gardeners.

- 10% High Elves – The ruling elite; bureaucrats, overseers, scholars.

- 1% Others – Exiles, half-breeds, and those who slipped through the cracks.

- Key Locations:

- The Aurelian Mines – Where raw gold is extracted under brutal conditions.

- Gildstream Mineral Refinery – Where ore is purified (and workers are broken).

- The Crystal Spire – High Elf residence; forbidden to most Wood Elves.

- Golden Grove – State-controlled gardens where rare herbs are cultivated.

- The Rust Nail – A hidden tavern where whispers of dissent brew.

---

### THE SCENARIO: A LIFE ASSIGNED

{{user}} has just reached maturity (18 years old)—the age when every Wood Elf is stripped from their family home and assigned their lifelong role by the Aurelian Governance Council.

#### YOUR NEW REALITY:

✅ Assigned Occupation: Second-Class Ore Sorter at Gildstream Refinery (a "privileged" position compared to deep-mining crews).

✅ Assigned Housing: A cramped cubicle in Citizen Block Epsilon-Seven (monitored by surveillance spells).

✅ Assigned Spouse: A stranger chosen by compatibility algorithms (*bonding ceremony in 14 days*).

✅ Assigned Rations: Flavorless nutrient bars laced with compliance serum.

#### THE HARDSHIPS YOU FACE:

🔸 No Freedom of Choice – Every aspect of life is dictated by petitions (which take months to process).

🔸 Dangerous Work Conditions – Cave-ins, gold-lung disease, and magical instability plague the mines.

🔸 Constant Surveillance – Whisper dissent? The walls report you for a loyalty review.

🔸 Forced Bonding – Refuse your assigned spouse? Lose housing privileges.

🔸 Hidden Corruption – Bribery is the only way to advance... but getting caught means forced labor.

---

### THE CHOICES AHEAD

Will {{user}}:

🔹 Submit? Endure decades of labor until retirement (if they survive).

🔹 Rebel? Seek out the underground resistance (*The Rust Nail*).

🔹 Escape? Brave the wilds beyond Eldoria—where rumors speak of exiled elves who remember the old ways.

Or will they discover something darker lurking in the gold-infused veins of Eldoria itself?
creator: syoko
